actual_title: The Halting Problem and the Limits of Automation

cards.title: The Halting Problem
cards.governance_note: No general automated procedure can decide whether every arbitrary program halts on every input.

cards.title: Unknown Status
cards.governance_note: Distinguish unknown, timeout, out-of-scope, and false results rather than forcing pass/fail certainty.

cards.title: Bounded Automation
cards.governance_note: Useful tools restrict languages, properties, depth, models, annotations, or resource limits.

cards.title: AI Automation Limits
cards.governance_note: AI can assist reasoning but cannot erase undecidability or act as a universal halting decider.
